title: Crude oil collapses as supply disruptions ease
section_path: Crude oil collapses as supply disruptions ease
section_path_text: Crude oil collapses as supply disruptions ease
summary:
Main
Easing supply-side issues triggered selling across the energy complex. Sentiment also soured following weak economic data in China. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-09-04 133949.png | assets/2024-09-04_crude-oil-collapses-as-supply-disruptions-ease_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_096b8862f954.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices collapsed after a deal to restore Libyan supply brought the focus back to the tepid demand backdrop.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Easing supply-side issues triggered selling across the energy complex. Sentiment also soured following weak economic data in China.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices collapsed after a deal to restore Libyan supply brought the focus back to the tepid demand backdrop. Libya's Sadiq Al-Kabir central banker governor said there are strong indications that political factions are nearing an agreement to overcome the current deadlock.
